title: helenium africanum
intro: Helenium africanum, also known as African Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to eastern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Helenium africanum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Helenium africanum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and respiratory infections.
